message:
refactor(repair): use let-else and avoid allocation in ownership assertions

Replace match+panic with let-else pattern for AcquireResult::Acquired
destructuring. Change mgr.host_id < host_b.to_string() to
mgr.host_id.as_str() < host_b to avoid unnecessary String allocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
